news.paragraph: The Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQ) is trading amidst mixed market signals, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average experiencing a dip following unexpected jobless claims data, while Nvidia's performance remains volatile post-earnings. Separately, an emerging markets CIO suggested potential for significant gains in that sector this year. Traders should monitor the tech sector's reaction to Nvidia's results and consider the broader macro environment influencing risk assets.

headlines.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls After Surprise Jobless Claims Data; Nvidia Waffles On Earnings (Live Coverage)
Emerging markets could soar this year, says CIO
